$schema_doc: Neutral attorney directory data for /find-attorney.html. See find-attorney-how-it-works.html for the public explanation of how this directory works. EXCLUSIONS: The site operator and any operator-affiliated law firm are PERMANENTLY EXCLUDED from this directory. The forbidden-string list and CI enforcement live in tests/directory-exclusion.test.js, which fails the build if any forbidden string appears in this file. Do not add the operator or any operator-affiliated firm under any circumstance. Sort policy: results are filtered by user-supplied geographic match (county or region), then RANDOMIZED PER SESSION using a Fisher-Yates shuffle seeded only at page load. There is no weighting, no paid placement, no referral tracking, no analytics attribution per firm, and no referral parameters appended to outbound links.
